name: forge
description: Forge — a structured, phase-gated development workflow with spec, research, planning, parallel execution, code review, and session enforcement.

tdd_mode.title: TDD Mode
tdd_mode.description: Enforce red-green TDD on every implementation task. task-implementer writes a failing test first, implements only enough to pass it, then moves on. Default: off.

auto_research.title: Auto Research
auto_research.description: Always run the research phase automatically without asking. Default: on.

strict_wave_review.title: Strict Wave Review
strict_wave_review.description: Run code-reviewer after every individual task instead of batching reviews per wave. Slower but catches issues earlier. Default: off.

worktree_default.title: Default Workspace Mode
worktree_default.description: Pre-select workspace mode so Forge skips the worktree/inline question. Options: 'worktree', 'inline', or leave blank to always ask.

auto_clean.title: Auto Clean on Ship
auto_clean.description: Automatically delete the .forge/ session directory when a feature is shipped (at the end of the Complete phase). Default: off.

verify_per_wave.title: Verify Per Wave
verify_per_wave.description: Run the full test suite after each wave completes, in addition to the final Verify phase. Catches regressions earlier but slows down implementation. Default: off.
